reason: Successfully navigated to the application, selected agent QA-20260714-200901-7cxa, verified idle status, sent mathematical query "Hello! What is 2+2?", received correct response "4", and verified completion within timeout.
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully showing "Your Agents" dashboard with sidebar containing two agents.
Found and clicked "QA-20260714-200901-7cxa" agent in sidebar — Agent page loaded, navigated to agent detail view with session support.
Verified agent status is "running" or "idle" — Agent status confirmed as "idle" in top-right corner of agent page.
Sent message "Hello! What is 2+2?" — Message typed in input field and submitted successfully; page navigated to new session "Simple Math Question Session".
Waited for agent response (up to 3 minutes) — Agent responded within 1 second with complete message.

Verified response mentions "4" and took screenshot — Response clearly displays "4" in conversation view; message content verified programmatically confirming ["Hello! What is 2+2?", "4"] in message list. Agent status returned to "idle" after processing.
